title: Vulca Minerals
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Vulca Minerals''' was a corporation active during the [[Rebellion era]].<ref name="GG">''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''</ref>

During the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] era, Vulca Minerals was a major player in the [[Meleenium/Legends|meleenium]] trade. Each [[Standard year/Legends|year]], they sent a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] to the high-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Af'El/Legends|Af'El]], the only known source of natural meleenium. They traded fresh [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuff]]s to the native [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] in return for meleenium.<ref name="GG" />

Vulca Minerals also managed [[yttrium]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] in [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]]. [[Ayla Shar]] worked with Vulca Minerals during this [[Time/Legends|time]]. Due to the pushy attitude of Vulca, native [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrians]] (particularly the [[m'Yalfor'ac Order]]) considered killing the team commander. Finally, it was decided that Bitthævrian-controlled [[Kadok Resources]] would manage all of Guiteica's exports.<ref name="AI">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

{{Company-stub}}
